name: Nissei Corporation
summary: Nissei Corporation manufactures and sells gearmotors and gears in Japan and internationally. The company offers induction gearmotors, IPM gearmotors, high precision reducers for servo motor, brushless DC gearmotors, battery powered gearmotors, and gearboxes. It also provides spur, helical, internal, spiral bevel, zerol bevel, HRH, and hypoid gears. In addition, it is involved in the rental of condominiums, etc. The company was formerly known as Nissei Industries Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Nissei Corporation in October 2000. The company was founded in 1942 and is headquartered in Anjo, Japan. Nissei Corporation is a subsidiary of Brother Industries, Ltd.
